campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and the city's efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also addressed housing security issues and upcoming community events including the Boogie Festival happening that weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Housing security and affordable housing concerns
Boogie Festival weekend event
Public hearing on council reports

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 20, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council adopted a resolution to identify certain properties in Saratoga and scheduled a public hearing for June 17, 2026, where residents can voice concerns before the city makes a final decision on the matter.
keyTopics: Resolution adopted to identify specific properties
Public hearing scheduled for June 17, 2026
Residents can submit protests before final approval

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council held a meeting on June 2, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, appoint a youth commissioner, and schedule a municipal election for November 3, 2026. The council also approved several agreements and maps related to development projects and authorized the town manager to sign contracts with software and service vendors.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 municipal election scheduled
Youth Commissioner appointment ratified
Tract 10675 development map approved
Multi-year software agreement with Accela, Inc.
Building division plan check service agreements

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 10, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize their upcoming agendas for June 16 and June 23, 2026. The council reviewed what items should be added to these meeting schedules and decided which items needed specific time slots to keep meetings on track.
keyTopics: Final agenda planning for June 16, 2026 council meeting
Draft agenda planning for June 23, 2026 council meeting
Community and Economic Development Committee work plan

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 9, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on June 9, 2026, to handle a closed-door personnel decision about hiring a new City Attorney, then held a public session to officially recognize Pride Month and Juneteenth with proclamations.
keyTopics: City Attorney appointment (decided in closed session)
Pride Month proclamation
Juneteenth proclamation

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 16, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held two back-to-back meetings on June 16, 2026. A closed session meeting was held first (details not public), followed by a study session where the council reviewed an update on the Community Equity Assessment.
keyTopics: Community Equity Assessment progress update
Closed session meeting

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how parks and recreational facilities are currently designated and zoned in Cupertino, and to make any necessary corrections to align with state law protections. The meeting also included a public comment period where residents could address the Council on any topics not already on the agenda.
keyTopics: Review of current park and recreational facility designations
Zoning corrections for parkland sites
State law protections for parks and recreational areas
Public comment period on non-agenda items

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting on June 1, 2026. Residents could attend in person or join remotely via Zoom to discuss stadium-related neighborhood issues.
keyTopics: Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting
In-person and remote participation options available
Public comment submission deadline: 10 a.m. one day before meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met on April 7, 2026 to handle routine business and planning updates. Key items included reviewing federal funding plans for community development, considering changes to how council vacancies are filled, and approving meeting records and schedules.
keyTopics: Update to 2025-2030 federal housing and community development funding plan
New workplan requests from individual council members
Proposed changes to council vacancy procedures
Approval of previous meeting minutes and upcoming meeting calendar

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 28, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council held a meeting covering updates from city departments and committees, improvements planned for the Foothills Nature Preserve, and decisions about the middle school athletics program's future management. The council also reviewed and confirmed the Parks and Recreation Commission's work plan for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: Foothills Nature Preserve Improvements Project updates
Middle school athletics program management model and direction
Parks and Recreation Commission fiscal year 2027 work plan approval
Department reports and staff presentations
Ad hoc committee and liaison updates
